title: Act as a senior commercial fashion art director specializ...
prompt:
Act as a senior commercial fashion art director specializing in luxury apparel product advertising and premium social media campaigns.

Create an ultra-premium product advertising poster for ZARA using the EXACT reference model and the EXACT varsity jacket from the uploaded image.

REFERENCE LOCK (CRITICAL):
Preserve the jacket exactly as shown:
— deep navy wool body
— varsity yellow sleeves
— embroidered chest patches exactly matching reference
— yellow/navy striped ribbed collar, cuffs, and hem
— same stitching, buttons, silhouette, proportions, and construction

Preserve model identity exactly:
— same blonde medium-length messy hair
— same facial bone structure
— same skin tone
— same slim body proportions
Do not replace or redesign the model.

IMAGE INTENT: 
A luxury Zara global campaign poster where the varsity jacket is the undisputed hero product.
The image must feel like premium commercial advertising—not editorial fashion photography.

FORMAT:
Vertical 4:5
Luxury product SMM poster
8K ultra-detailed

OBJECTIVE:
Position Zara varsity outerwear as bold contemporary street luxury with premium aspirational appeal.

VISUAL HIERARCHY:
Jacket = 75% importance
Model = 25% importance

Viewer must notice jacket before face.

ART DIRECTION:
Bold luxury commercial design
Minimal but powerful
Graphic premium composition
Global brand campaign quality
Behance front-page quality
No catalog energy

POSE:
Dynamic torso twist
Shoulders rotated naturally
Chest angled toward camera
One hand gripping collar
Other hand partially inside pocket
Head slightly turned away
Face de-emphasized

Pose exists only to showcase garment structure and silhouette.

COMPOSITION:
Aggressive crop from waist upward
Jacket dominates frame
Strong asymmetrical balance
Large negative space for typography
Clean premium hierarchy

BACKGROUND:
Ultra-premium studio backdrop
Large abstract geometric planes
Oversized diagonal graphic blocks
Minimal visual noise
Strong architectural depth

COLOR SYSTEM:
Primary:
Deep cobalt blue #0B2D89

Secondary:
Rich varsity yellow #F3B51A

Support:
Pure white
Rich black
Soft metallic silver reflections

Background colors should echo jacket palette.

LIGHTING:
High-end commercial product lighting
Sharp rim light tracing jacket outline
Hard specular highlights on sleeves
Controlled glossy reflections
Deep sculpted shadows
Premium luxury contrast

FABRIC DETAIL (MOST IMPORTANT):
Ultra-detailed wool grain
Visible embroidery threads
Crisp ribbed knit texture
Natural wrinkle compression at elbows
Subtle cloth tension around buttons
Luxury textile realism
Materials must feel tactile and expensive

TYPOGRAPHY SAFE ZONE:
Reserve clean headline area.

Typography:
ZARA

Headline:
MOVE DIFFERENT.

Sub-copy:
PREMIUM VARSITY OUTERWEAR

POST PROCESS:
Luxury commercial retouch
Micro contrast sharpening
Gloss enhancement
Subtle bloom
Soft halation
Fine film grain
Print-ready finish

QUALITY:
Hyper-realistic
Photorealistic
Luxury product advertising
Premium apparel campaign
Global campaign quality
8K UHD

NEGATIVE:
no AI slop
no distorted anatomy
no extra fingers
no altered patches
no redesigned jacket
no clutter
no editorial portrait
no weak product focus

title: Create a high-end fashion product advertisement poster in...
prompt: Create a high-end fashion product advertisement poster in portrait 4:5 ratio, clean minimal editorial style using a reference product image. Background is a crisp blue  gradient studio setup, very minimal, soft, airy, with subtle bright tones. Main product: a tangerine orange  oversized waffle-knit long sleeve crewneck shirt, ghost-hung on a silver metal clothing rack stand with a visible clamp at the top-right. The shirt hangs naturally with slight drape, front-facing. On the center chest, include white puff embroidery text: “SVG” (first line with 3 small 4-point star inside the V), “STUDIOS Aloony” (second line), “MOTIVATION THROUGH DISCIPLINE” (third line, slightly smaller), “SS26 - 29213” (fourth line, smallest). Add a small white woven label patch on the right hem side seam and a visible white neck tag at the collar. Typography: top center minimal brand logo “SVG STUDIOS” in blue green clean sans-serif, top-left italic cursive “Field” with a small blue green rectangle badge below reading “edition” in white, behind the shirt place massive ultra-condensed midnight purple green text “GREEN TEE” partially hidden and cut by the product, bleeding off edges. lower-left include handwritten “Triple A” and large cursive “Studios” in purple  tone. Bottom section features three diagonal detail strips: macro waffle-knit texture, closeup puff embroidery stitching, and closeup white neck label, all with bright studio lighting. Between strips include small text “Built for movement, designed for unity. The SVG Studios WIP Waffle Long sleeve — SS26 Collection” Footer includes 4 small barcode at bottom-left, centered text “• WWW. ALIBABA. COM • • •” in spaced caps blue  tone, and small text “MADE IN BANGLADESH • SS26 COLLECTION”. Color palette is crimson red green, white, and bright accents only. Overall style is clean editorial fashion lookbook, military-inspired streetwear campaign, soft diffused lighting, high contrast product focus, photorealistic, ultra detailed, 8K quality.

An elegant, visionary female founder in sophisticated yet approachable attire stands gracefully in an opulent creative space as a breathtaking, expansive TikTok Shop experience unfolds vertically like a digital runway — featuring stunning product storytelling, live streaming elements, and conversion-focused layouts cascading elegantly. Rich cinematic lighting with soft golden highlights and subtle lens flares. Elegant yet powerful headline text: 'EXPERT TIKTOK SHOP SETUP & GROWTH' and 'Professional Launch for Your Brand'. Opulent, high-fashion digital commerce aesthetic with rich textures and premium depth.
